titleStmt.title: SII 27.17: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 17. (A.R. No. 317 of 1937-38.) EṞṞAMAṬHAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in survey No. 400 near the ruined Bhairavēśvarasvāmin temple.
This record is dated Śaka 997, Rākshasa, Chaitra-puṇṇame, Friday, lunnar eclipse corresponding regularly to 1075 A.D., April 3.

The inscription states that while the king was camping at Baṅkāpura, his subordinate mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Satyarasa of the Jīmūtavāhana lineage, bearing the title Tagarapuravarēśvara and having for his banner the crest of the golden eagle, got the temple of Bikkēśvara built in the name of his father Bikkeyarasa, and granted the income from taxes muyipu-kāṇike and koḻuṅgeḻe arising out of his manneya to the same temple for worship, offerings and burning a lamp and for feeding ascetics in the charity-house attached to it. The gift was made after laving the feet of Sadyōjāta-paṇḍita of Eḍeyamaṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya
śrī prithvī vallabha mahārājādhi
rāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka
satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaika
malladēvara vijayarājya mutta
rōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
baṁkāpurada nelevīḍinoḷu su
kha saṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyu
ttaviralu . tatpāda padmōpajīvi sa
madhigata paṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tagarapuravarēśvaraṁ
mṛḍagāra ghōṣaṇaṁ Avubaḷabhī
ṣaṇaṁ sivarājaśēkharaṁ śvarṇna
garuḍadhvajaṁ pratyakṣa jīmūtavā
hanakula saṁbhavaṁ mandākinī vara
prasādōditananēka ripumarddanaṁ
vīrakāntā manōbaṁ śaucāṁjanēyaṁ

samaraika
malli
kārjjuna dē
va pādā
bja bhriṁgaṁ
sāhasō
ttuṁgaṁ śrī
manmahā
maṇḍaḷēśva
ra satyara
saru tamma
yya bikke
yarasana he
saralu Eḍe
yamaṭadali
dēvaraṁ prati
ṣṭe māḍi dē
gulamane
ttini sakava
rṣa 997 neya
ya rākṣa
sa saṁvatsara
da caitrada
puṇṇame su
kravāradandu

sōmagrahaṇa nimittadiṁ bi
kkēśvara dēvara nivēdyakkaṁ nandādī
vigegaṁ tapōdhanargge satrakkaṁ taṁmma
manneya muyipu kāṇike
yuṁ koḻuṁṅgeḻiyu minti ni
tumaṁ sarvanamasvamāgi biṭṭa .
svasti yamaniyama svādhyāya
dhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭā
ṇa japa samādhi saṁpaṁnara
ppa śrīmadeḍeyamaṭhada sadyō
jāta paṇḍitara kālaṁkarcci dhārāpū
rvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru . svadattaṁ pa
radattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā .
śaṣṭirvvariṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē kṛmi . sāmānyōyaṁ dha
rmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kā
lē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvā nētāṁ
bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmabhadra
Digital edition of SII 27.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
